items.caption:
This surprising coffee trick might be the secret to bug-free evenings… 🇬🇷

We’ve been seeing locals do this on the Greek islands for years, so we decided to give it a go this summer… and it definitely helps!

Simply burn a small amount of ground coffee and let the smoke drift around your seating area. The smell seems to help keep mosquitoes and other pesky bugs away, making those warm evenings much more enjoyable.

Have you ever tried this trick? Or do you have another insect repellent hack that really works? 

Let me know below! 👇

#summerhacks #queenofclean

Holiday outfit round-up! ☀️

I’m back after a fabulous week in sunny Kefalonia 🇬🇷, and one of my favourite things about going away is getting to wear all those lovely colourful summer outfits that don’t get nearly enough outings at home!

These were some of my favourite looks from the week, and I know so many of you have been asking where they’re from.

💛 If you’d like the link to any of them, just comment LINK below and I’ll send it straight to your inbox. (Aff link) 

Which outfit was your favourite? 👗✨

Have a lovely Friday evening everyone! 💕
items.transcript: Let me talk to you, show you what love can do. I wanna see you move, I know you can feel it too.

items.caption:
AD - One travel essential I never pack without! ✈️

Have you ever arrived at your hotel, unpacked your suitcase... and realised there are hardly any hangers? 🙈

These foldable travel hangers have completely solved that problem for me. They fold down flat, take up hardly any space in your suitcase, and are perfect for hanging dresses, tops, shirts and lightweight jackets as soon as you arrive.

It’s one of those simple travel hacks that makes your hotel room feel so much more organised.

#amazonfind #travelessential

If strawberries are on your shopping list this summer, you need this little gadget!

This strawberry huller removes the stem and core in seconds with hardly any waste. It’s quick, easy to use, and makes prepping strawberries for snacks, desserts or fruit salads so much simpler.

One of those inexpensive kitchen gadgets that you’ll wonder how you managed without!

#amazonfind #kitchenmusthave

AD - One of those little gadgets you never knew you needed!

If you’re forever opening post, this electric envelope opener makes the job so quick and effortless. 

Simply glide it along the edge of the envelope for a neat, clean cut no more struggling, ripped letters or accidental paper cuts!

Perfect if you work from home, run a business, or just get through lots of post. It’s one of those small gadgets that makes everyday life that little bit easier.

#amazonfind #musthave #officemusthaves

Anyone else do this on holiday, or is it just me? 😂

Trying to guess where everyone’s from, spotting the same faces wherever we go, and wondering how they’ve managed to get the same sunbeds every single day! 🤣

What’s your funny little holiday habit? 🌴☀️👇

#holidayfun #peoplewatching

Ice Cube Hack ✨

Got creased clothes but no time to get the iron out? Simply pop your garment into the tumble dryer with some ice cubes and run it on a high heat for around 10 minutes. As the ice melts, it creates steam that helps relax the fabric and reduce creases, leaving many items ready to wear in minutes.

💡 Best for lightweight fabrics and small loads.

#TumbleDryerHack #LaundryHack #CleaningTips #LifeHack #HomeHacks

AD - This has to be one of the cutest kitchen gadgets I’ve seen!

Meet the Egguins—a clever little penguin-shaped holder that lets you cook, store and serve up to six eggs all in one.

Simply load your eggs into the holder, lower it into the pan to boil, then lift them straight out when they’re done. Once they’ve cooled, pop the whole holder into the fridge ready for breakfast or meal prep.

Practical, fun and perfect if you regularly boil eggs. I’ll pop the link below if you’d like to take a look! 🥚🐧💚

#amazonfind

Stop fruit flies fast with this simple summer hack!

Fill a recycled jar with a splash of white vinegar and a few drops of washing-up liquid, then make a few small holes in the lid.

The vinegar attracts the fruit flies, while the washing-up liquid breaks the surface tension so they become trapped.

Place it near your fruit bowl or food waste bin for the best results. Simple, inexpensive and surprisingly effective!

Have you tried this hack? 👇

#summerhack #fruitflies #queenofclean

AD -  If flies are ruining your time outside, you’ll want to see this!

These Zero In Outdoor Fly Traps are designed to attract and trap flies, helping keep your garden, patio and outdoor seating areas much more enjoyable during the warmer months.

They’re non-toxic, ready baited and incredibly easy to set up just hang them away from where you’re sitting and let them do the hard work.

It’s one of those simple summer essentials that can make a big difference, especially if you’re planning BBQs, garden parties or just want to enjoy your morning coffee outside without constantly swatting flies!

#amazonfind

Stop scrubbing your window tracks! Here’s a quicker, easier way to get them clean. ✨

Drench a piece of kitchen roll with white vinegar, place it into the window track, then simply swipe it along to lift dirt and debris in one go. For those tight grooves, use the back of a spoon to push the kitchen roll right into the corners for a deep clean.

✅ No fiddly brushes
✅ No chasing dust around
✅ Cleans and lifts debris at the same time

It’s one of my favourite window cleaning hacks because it takes seconds and leaves your window tracks looking so much fresher. Give it a try and let me know if you’re adding this one to your cleaning routine! 💗

#WindowCleaning #CleaningHack #WindowTracks #CleaningTips #QueenOfClean

My inbox is officially breaking me… 😂

Just a bit of fun jumping on the Netflix documentary trend! 🎬

Truth is, I do get asked the same cleaning questions over and over again, but my inbox is always open and I genuinely love helping you all. ❤️

If you’ve ever messaged me, thank you for keeping me busy! 😂

💬 What’s the question people ask you all the time?

Dress 👗 @whitegingeruk 

#NetflixTrend #QueenOfClean #CleaningTips #CleaningExpert #FunnyReels

AD - The cutest measuring spoons I’ve ever owned!

Who says kitchen gadgets have to be boring? 😍 

These adorable cherry measuring spoons also double up as an egg separator, so they’re as practical as they are cute.

✔️ Measuring spoons all in one place
✔️ Built-in egg separator
✔️ BPA-free & dishwasher safe
✔️ Perfect for baking lovers

They’ve definitely brightened up my kitchen! 🍒❤️

#amazonfind #kitchenmusthaves

AD - One of my kitchen cleaning must-haves!

If you haven’t tried the Fairy Skip the Soak Power Spray yet, it’s well worth adding to your cleaning cupboard.

It’s brilliant for tackling dried-on food on plates, roasting trays and pans. Just spray it on, leave it to work for a few minutes, then wash as normal—no endless soaking or scrubbing!

It’s one of those products I always like to have on hand because it makes washing up so much quicker and easier.

#queenofclean #cleaningtips #cleaninghacks #skipthesoak

AD - If you’ve got an overgrown hedge or small tree, this is such a handy garden tool!

The Ryobi ONE+ 18V Cordless Pole Hedge Trimmer makes it so much easier to tackle those hard-to-reach branches without constantly moving a ladder around. The extendable pole gives you extra reach, the 45cm blade cuts through overgrowth with ease, and because it’s cordless, you’re not trailing cables around the garden.

Perfect for giving hedges, shrubs and small trees a neat trim while keeping both feet firmly on the ground. 🌳✂️

#amazonfind #gardening

3 Toilet Hacks That Actually Work 🚽✨

Freshen your bathroom naturally
 
Pop a few drops of your favourite essential oil inside the cardboard tube of your toilet roll. Every time the roll moves, it releases a lovely fresh scent. Replace every 2–3 days.

Tackle stubborn limescale

 Sprinkle citric acid into the toilet bowl before bed and leave it overnight. In the morning, give it a quick scrub and flush to help lift stubborn limescale and mineral build-up.

Freshen around the toilet

Spray shaving foam around the base of the toilet, leave it for 10–15 minutes, then wipe away. It’s great for helping to absorb lingering urine odours and freshen the area.

Simple, affordable hacks that can make a real difference! 💕

#queenofclean #toilethacks

Sweaty baseball cap? 🤢

A quick spray of dry shampoo inside the cap helps absorb sweat, freshen it up and keep it smelling better between washes. Perfect for busy summer days! 🧢☀️

Have you tried this hack yet?

#CleaningHack #QueenOfClean #SummerHacks #DryShampooHack #LifeHack

We’re off to the pub quiz now, so wish us luck… although if my general knowledge is anything like this heatwave, it could go either way! 🤣🍻

Have a lovely evening everyone! ❤️

items.transcript: Too hot, too hot lady. Gotta run for shelter, gotta run for shade. It's too hot

items.caption:
Too hot to sleep? Try this simple cooling hack!

Fill a hot water bottle with cold water, pop it in the freezer for a few hours, then take it to bed for a refreshing way to stay cool on warm nights.

⚠️ Safety tip: Once you’ve used a hot water bottle for freezing, keep it as a cold-only bottle. Freezing can weaken the rubber over time, so don’t switch it back to using hot water, as it could fail and leak.

Have you ever tried this? 🌙❄️

#summerhack #queenofclean #heatwave #summer
